The '''Corellian/B-wing Ugly''', also known as the '''C-Wing Ugly''', was an [[Ugly/Legends|Ugly]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] built by bolting the cockpit of a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian]] [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] onto the fuselage of a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]].

==Design==
The Corellian/B-wing was essentially flying junk, typically only used by cash-strapped [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], built using wreckage found at various battle-sites.

The Ugly's mission profile usually only required the vessel to damage lightly [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]] targets. Against heavier-shielded and better-armed vessels, the Ugly was less than a match. The cobbled-together nature of their construction also meant that very few Uglies could be relied upon to perform at anywhere near peak levels.

A large number of these Uglies were employed by the [[Sacorrian Triad]] during the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]], but they were no match for the [[Bakura/Legends|Bakuran]] fleet's [[General Purpose Attack Fighter]]s.

Later "refinements" to the design included an anti-infantry [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]], intended for use on the ground, attached to the ship's undercarriage.
